reviews.review_description: It looked like a great simulator until I installed it. It is pay to play and has nudity that it doesn’t talk about on the oculus page. It only has like 3 languages and is mainly in French.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your thoughts about our application. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused and would like to address your concerns.

Help XR is currently in early access, and we are actively working on completing all voiceovers in English and expanding the language options to provide a more inclusive experience. At this stage, the app primarily caters to training professionals, which is why it operates under a licensing model and is not a typical consumer application.

Regarding your mention of nudity, we are unsure of what you are referring to, as the application does not contain any such content. If you believe there’s been a misunderstanding or an issue, please contact our support team directly so we can investigate further.

We appreciate your understanding and are committed to improving the application based on feedback like yours. Thank you for your patience as we continue refining Help XR.
